---
title: "IV Flowchart"
author: "Ian McCarthy"
date: "Today"
output: html_document
---

This is just a test for now...

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(DiagrammeR)

mermaid('
graph TD
A("Thinking of IV?")-->B("How big is the problem?")
A-->C
C-->E
B-->D
C-->D
D-->F
E-->F
click B "http://ianmccarthyecon.netlify.app/teaching/iv_problem.html" "Details"
')
```


<!-- ```{r, echo=FALSE} -->
<!-- DiagrammeR::grViz(" -->

<!--   digraph instrumental_variables { -->


<!--     # Level 1 node -->
<!--     node [shape = box] -->
<!--     A [label = 'So you want to do IV, eh?'] -->


<!--     # Level 2 nodes -->
<!--     node [shape = box] -->
<!--     a [label = 'how big is the problem?'] -->
<!--     b [label = 'specification tests'] -->
<!--     c [label = 'sensitivity'] -->

<!--     # Level 3 nodes -->
<!--     node [shape = box] -->
<!--     b1 [label = 'first-stage'] -->
<!--     b2 [label = 'exogeneity'] -->
<!--     b3 [label = 'exclusion'] -->
<!--     c1 [label = 'IV is biased!'] -->
<!--     c2 [label = 'what about outliers?'] -->
<!--     c3 [label = 'weak instruments?'] -->


<!--     # Level 4 nodes -->
<!--     node [shape = box] -->
<!--     b12 [label = 'relevance'] -->
<!--     b13 [label = 'strength'] -->

<!--     # Termminal level 3 nodes -->
<!--     node [shape = box] -->
<!--     a1  [label =  -->
<!--     < -->
<!--       <a href="https://ianmccarthyecon.nelify.app/resources/oster_2017">Oster (2017)</a> -->
<!--     > -->
<!--     ] -->

<!--     a2  [label =  -->
<!-- < -->
<!-- <b>Hausman-Durbin-Wu Test</b><br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- &#8226; Test of equality between<br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- IV and OLS estimates.<br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- &#8226; Caveat...assumes you have<br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- a good instrument already.<br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- &#8226; <b>hausman</b>  in Stata<br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- > -->
<!--         ]     -->




<!--     # Termminal level 4 nodes     -->
<!--     node [shape = box]     -->

<!--     b31 [label =  -->
<!-- < -->
<!-- <b>Overidentification</b><br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- &#8226; Sargan test with IID errors<br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- &#8226; Hansen's J test with non-IID errors<br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- &#8226; Requires overidentified model (extra IVs)<br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- &#8226; Null is IVs are valid<br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- > -->
<!--         ] -->


<!--     c21 [label =  -->
<!-- < -->
<!-- <b>Cohen et al (2011)</b><br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- &#8226; Robust IV, allows estimation <br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- that is less sensitive to outliers<br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- using a location and scatter S-estimator. <br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- &#8226; <b>robivreg</b>  in Stata<br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- &#8226; <b>riv</b>  in R<br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- > -->
<!--         ] -->

<!--     c12 [label =  -->
<!-- < -->
<!-- <b>Andrews and Armstrong (2017)</b><br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- &#8226; Allows for an unbiased IV estimate<br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- if you know the sign of the first stage.<br ALIGN='LEFT'/> -->
<!-- &#8226; <b>aaniv</b>  in Stata<br ALIGN='LEFT'/>  -->
<!-- > -->
<!--         ] -->

<!--     # Terminal level 5 nodes -->
<!--     node [shape = box]     -->
<!--     b121 [label = 'First-stage F-test for all instruments'] -->
<!--     b122 [label = 'First-stage F-test for all instruments'] -->

<!--     # add edge statements -->
<!--     edge [color = grey, arrowhead = none, arrowtail = none] -->
<!--     A -> a; A -> b; A -> c; a -> a1; a -> a2; -->
<!--     c -> c1; c -> c2; c2 -> c21; c1 -> c12; -->
<!--     b -> b1; b -> b2; b-> b3; -->
<!--     {rank = same; a; b; c}; -->
<!--     {rank = same; b1; b2; b3; c1; c2; c3}; -->
<!--     {rank = same; c21; c12; a1; a2} -->




<!--     # add graph statement -->
<!--     graph [nodesep = 0.1] -->

<!--   } -->

<!-- ") -->

<!-- ``` -->
